title: Bachelder timed troop-position map set + Elliott burial map: acquisition + georeference manifest
frame: battlefield-local meters: local_x = EPSG:26918 easting - 304208.0216360274, local_z = northing - 4404534.271124143 (data/heightmap/heightmap.json origin)
transformConvention: local = [a -b; b a] * (img_x, -img_y) + (tx, ty)  -- tool/src/overlay.ts similarity; apply via reconstruction/scripts/georef_maps.py
acquisition: reconstruction/scripts/fetch_bachelder_maps.sh reproduces data/maps/ from the pinned URLs + sha256 below

referenceTiePoints.name: peach-orchard-crossroads
referenceTiePoints.basis: OSM node 4856642708 (Emmitsburg Rd x Wheatfield Rd), historic crossroads
referenceTiePoints.pinNote: crossing of Emmitsburg Rd and the Wheatfield Rd at the Peach Orchard NW corner, Wentz house NE quadrant

referenceTiePoints.name: taneytown-x-wheatfield
referenceTiePoints.basis: OSM node (Taneytown Rd x Wheatfield Rd)
referenceTiePoints.pinNote: N-S Taneytown Rd meets the E-W cross road, L. Bricker farm SE

referenceTiePoints.name: town-diamond
referenceTiePoints.basis: landmark-anchors doc #4 (Lincoln Square centroid; AREA, +/-25 m)
referenceTiePoints.pinNote: Baltimore/Carlisle x Chambersburg/York crossing at the '412' benchmark

referenceTiePoints.name: fairfield-x-blackhorsetavern
referenceTiePoints.basis: OSM node 105711642 (Fairfield Rd x Black Horse Tavern Rd)
referenceTiePoints.pinNote: junction SE of the Marsh Creek bridge at Black Horse Tavern

referenceTiePoints.name: mummasburg-x-herrsridge
referenceTiePoints.basis: OSM node 105767786 (Mummasburg Rd x Herrs Ridge Rd)
referenceTiePoints.pinNote: crossing E of the S. Hertzel farm

referenceTiePoints.name: codori-barn
referenceTiePoints.pinNote: SW large building of the N. Codori farmstead; which 1873 square = the modern barn is ambiguous (+/-20 m)

referenceTiePoints.name: bryan-farm
referenceTiePoints.pinNote: centroid of the two-building BRYAN cluster (+/-20 m)

referenceFit.note: rotation includes UTM 18N grid convergence at Gettysburg (about -1.4 deg) plus print/scan orientation; residuals mix pin error, 1863-vs-modern road-junction drift, and paper distortion. Affine experiments reduced road-junction residuals but were not adopted (overlay.ts similarity parity; see spatial-evidence doc).

uncertaintyGuidance.relativeOnSheetM: 10-20 (patch registration residuals; use for unit-to-unit offsets read off one sheet)
uncertaintyGuidance.note: EC3 anchors read off any main-field sheet should carry an uncertainty radius >= max(estAbsUncertaintyM, feature legibility); 2x rms ~ 60 m is the recommended default for absolute placements.

license.basis: underlying work: US government-commissioned survey map, 1873 base printed pre-1930 (public domain); Bachelder manuscript overlay delivered to the War Department 1886, first published 1995 (see 17 USC 303(a) discussion in docs/research/2026-07-02-bachelder-timed-set-acquisition.md section 3.2). Scan: David Rumsey Map Collection, formal license CC BY-NC-SA 3.0; Rumsey permissions page additionally grants publication use with credit.
license.credit: David Rumsey Map Collection, David Rumsey Map Center, Stanford Libraries
license.repoPosture: full-res rasters gitignored + fetch-reproducible; positions read off the sheets are uncopyrightable facts (Feist framing, README licensing section); low-res documentation crops only (sheet8-crops precedent).

georef.method: patch phase-correlation to reference sheet, composed with reference fit

tiePoints.name: hanover-x-lowdutch
tiePoints.basis: OSM nodes 105726224/105726226 midpoint (Hanover Rd x Low Dutch Rd)

tiePoints.name: rummel-farm
tiePoints.basis: OSM way 'Rummel Farm' centroid vs 1880 farmstead cluster centroid (+/-20 m)

georef.note: East Cavalry Field is off the heightmap square (local_x > 8507); the frame extends by the same UTM offset. PROVISIONAL: two ties + one check; scan is coarser (~1.28 m/px).

elliott.title: Elliott's map of the battlefield of Gettysburg (S.G. Elliott, surveyed ~spring 1864)

license.basis: published 1864, US public domain; Library of Congress scan, no known restrictions
license.credit: Library of Congress, Geography and Map Division (LC Civil War Maps 332)

georef.method: two-point exact solve (overlay.ts workflow); Codori check residual below
georef.note: Elliott's planimetry is loose away from the town-PO tie line (Codori check ~77 m); treat burial-feature positions as +/-100 m class evidence.
